items.title: Head of Product & Engineering
items.summary: Product and engineering lead for Sip & Scale’s digital experience: a global Gen Z community of founders, investors, and creators, built around curated dinners in major tech hubs.
details: Owned the marketing site, landing pages, and core web touchpoints end to end: narrative, discovery, and engagement.
Helped the community grow from Manila into international hubs.

items.title: Software Engineer Intern
items.summary: Marketing pages and customer dashboards with React, Next.js, and TypeScript.
details: Shipped a full marketing landing page from responsive UI through production.
Collaborate with 5+ engineers on a customer-facing dashboard.
Build scalable front-end components in an agile workflow.

items.title: AVP for IT Skills & Development
items.summary: Led workshops for 20+ developers and shipped internal tooling for the IT cluster.
details: Coached officers and members to level up and stay active in the cluster.
Ran workshops and trainings aligned with project needs.
Oversaw app and internal tool projects end to end.

items.title: Head of HR
items.summary: Owned recruitment, onboarding, and member formation for the organization.
details: Drove member formation programs and internal initiatives.
Ran recruitment and onboarding for new members.
Organized events for growth and team cohesion.

items.title: Founder
items.summary: Founded a web app for org events and mixers; led a team of three and gathered early org feedback.
details: Set product direction, built backend pieces, and planned go-to-market for a tool aimed at better events and icebreakers.
Managed a small student design and engineering team.
Reached out to orgs and communities for pilots and feedback before launch.

items.title: Externals Core Team
items.summary: Managed communications and follow-ups for Seniors' Send-Off event
details: Drafted and sent professional email communications to seniors and alumni for the Seniors' Send-Off X LoopBack 2025 event
Managed follow-ups to ensure timely responses and smooth event preparation

items.title: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
Frontend Developer
items.summary: Built user-friendly interfaces for CompSAt projects
details: Implemented user-friendly interfaces for CompSAt projects, ensuring seamless navigation and visually appealing layouts
Worked with fellow developers to create intuitive digital experiences that align with organizational goals and standards

items.title: Logistics Core Team | Blue Hacks 2025
items.summary: Managed logistics for Blue Hacks 2025 hackathon
details: Managed logistics for Blue Hacks 2025, overseeing venue reservation, layout setup, food coordination, and event materials
Ensured smooth event execution by handling the timely delivery and arrangement of resources
Collaborated with team members to meet deadlines and maintain efficiency throughout the planning and event day

items.title: Web Developer
items.summary: Led team of 3 developers to build TEDx event website
details: Led a team of 3 developers to design and build the TEDxAteneoDeManila 2025 website, ensuring a seamless user experience
Aligned the site's layout and navigation with the event theme and TEDx brand standards
Ensured optimal performance and responsiveness across all devices
